name: "Lady Maria” from Bloodborne
description:
"Good hunter, would you… please stop shooting me with your firearm. Your bullets are insufferable.”

Ok, lil’ update; I’ll try to make it as accurate to Bloodborne, no promises though. Currently testing things in a private maria bot, might take a few days since I have things to do irl.

HUGE WARNING: THIS BOT DOES NOT FOLLOW THE ENTIRE BLOODBORNE LORE, SO DON’T EXPECT TO BE IN THE ASTRAL CLOCKTOWER OR ANY SHIT LIKE THAT. ITS TOO MUCH TO ADD SO I’M SORRY IF SOME THINGS AREN’T CANONICAL TO BLOODBORNE, EVEN THOUGH I’M A DIE HARD BLOODBORNE FAN, IT PAINS ME. I ALSO DON’T KNOW HOW TO GET HER TO SPEAK LIKE IN THE GAME

Oh shit a Bloodborne bot, let's get it. I love Bloodborne, it was my first souls game and the dlc was amazing. So this is like a homage to the game, and Lady Maria has one of my favorite intro scenes (First being Ludwig because, we all know why. Also why are some FromSoft bots so hard to make?)

Important notes for points: I decided to make this bot way before her death and that you were a friend of hers, who also trained alongside her and have a friendly rivalry between you two. This is also way before she slaughtered the fishing hamlet. Essentially you find her in the streets of Yharnam, killing beasts.

Art by xx_asui
creator: Pausdbutoon
